title: arawakia lingulata
intro: Arawakia lingulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Icacinaceae, commonly known as the yellow-berried Icacinaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of New Guinea and has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. The roots and leaves of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
